description: A vertical graphic on a dark navy background. The top shows a line-art scroll document with a list and a circled X mark, and a stylized 2025 with the curved label END-OF-YEAR REVIEW. Below, white and gold and light-blue text reads USCIS took action to stop the abuse of parole programs, closing loopholes exploited by criminal aliens to enter the U.S. The Department of Homeland Security seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the bottom left.
notable_text: END-OF-YEAR REVIEW; 2025; USCIS took action to stop the abuse of parole programs, closing loopholes exploited by criminal aliens to enter the U.S.
